aero: adjective. Of or pertaining to aviation.
are: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Western Arrernte.
ars: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Najdi Arabic.
arse: noun. A person's buttocks; the bottom, the backside.
ass: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Ipulo.
ave: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-3 language code for Avestan.
aver: verb. To assert the truth of (something); to affirm (something) with confidence; to declare (something) in a positive manner.
avers: verb. third-person singular simple present indicative of aver
averse: adjective. Having a repugnance or opposition of mind.
avo: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Agavotaguerra.
ear: noun. The organ of hearing, consisting of the pinna or auricle, auditory canal, eardrum, malleus, incus, stapes and cochlea.
era: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Eravallan.
erases: verb. third-person singular simple present indicative of erase
eros: noun. A winged figure of a child representing love or its power.
erose: adjective. Irregularly notched, eaten away, as though bitten.
ers: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Ersu.
ess: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Central Siberian Yupik.
oar: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Old Aramaic.
ora: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Oroha.
ore: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Orejón.
ors: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Orang Seletar.
oses: noun. The various sugars ending in -ose, such as sucrose, lactose, glucose, and fructose.
overseas: adjective. Abroad, especially across the sea.
ras: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Tegali.

rave: noun. An enthusiastic review (such as of a play).

rose: noun. A shrub of the genus Rosa, with red, pink, white or yellow flowers.

saros: noun. A quantity of 3600, such as a period of 3600 years.

sea: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Semai.

ser: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Serrano.
sera: noun. plural of serum; alternative form of serums
soar: verb. To fly high with little effort, like a bird.
soever: adverb. In any fashion, of any kind; used for emphasis after words such as how, what, which etc.
sora: noun. A rail (Porzana carolina) bird of North, Central, and northern South America.
sore: adjective. Causing pain or discomfort; painfully sensitive.

var: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Huarijio.
vas: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Vasavi.

voe: noun. A narrow sea inlet, particularly in the Shetland Islands, similar to a fjord.
